title: Üsküdar University Manifesto
content:
Üsküdar University Manifesto

Our basic standards will be made suitable for the basic problem and use for humanity,

acting with respect to the environment and nature, protecting our corporate values

Üsküdar University offers solutions to local and global problems
            producing and announcing manifestos.

Manifesto of the 8th International Congress of Creation in the Light of Science

Manifesto for Universal Human Values and Rights

A Manifesto for Post-traumatic Growth as

a Result of Earthquake

Üsküdar University Anti-War Manifesto:

IS WAR NECESSARY?

for The Post-Pandemic!

"Phygitalization Manifesto" from Uskudar University

10-Points "Family's Manifesto" from the Family Working Group

Mental Health Day

Manifesto Released
